_comment: Calibrated SPXW examples for the 2piece note. sigma/beta/alpha/gamma are coefficients of 1,k,k^2,k^3 of the local-vol cubic in ANNUALISED %, k = log(K/F). delta = gamma discontinuity added at the ATM knot k=0 as delta*k^3*H(k). dte = business days to expiry. Calibrated from real SPXW market data and user-reviewed 2026-05-19 (kept for now); calibration provenance is recorded in the project memory.

examples.label: Happy case — SPXW 2025-03-10 DTE 1 (monotone skew, no knot)
Concave case — SPXW 2025-03-10 DTE 3 (concave, no knot)
Unhappy case — happy cubic + fake ATM knot at k=0
examples.source: Happy cubic (SPXW 2025-03-10 DTE1) with the real first-knot jump moved to k=0
